recommendedMutationPrimitives.rationale: Most failures spend turns in date picker setup. Build Google Flights /travel/flights/search or /travel/explore URLs from parsed route, dates, trip type, cabin, passengers, and stops when task parameters are explicit.
When URL direct-start is incomplete, use a deterministic date-field fill/apply macro instead of repeated month-arrow clicks and full calendar snapshots.
Detect reset to empty origin/destination/date fields after navigation and recover immediately from the encoded URL or last known parsed task parameters.
Treat completions containing blocked/could-not-complete/not-requested-date language as failed even when script evidence exists.
Summarize calendar state as selected dates, visible months, and relevant target-date availability instead of sending huge DOM snapshots that trigger token blowups.

cases.goal: Locate the cheapest round-trip flights from New York to Tokyo leaving on January 25, 2026, and returning on February 15, 2026.
cases.verdict: Could not complete within remaining turns. Concrete blocker: a persistent open navigation drawer/dialog intercepted interactions earlier, and we never reached flight results. Current visible state shows origin 'New York', destination 'Tokyo', empty 'Departure' and 'Return' fields, and URL https://www.google.com/travel/flights?tfs=CBwQARodag0IAxIJL20vMDJfMjg2cgwIAxIIL20vMDdkZmsaHWoMCAMSCC9tLzA3ZGZrcg0IAxIJL20vMDJfMjg2QAFIAXABggELCP___________wGYAQE&tfu=KgIIAw. No cheapest round-trip fare is visible, so the requested result cannot be evidenced from the current page state.

cases.goal: Compare prices for economy class round-trip flights from Dubai to Rome, departing on March 1, 2026, and returning on March 8, 2026, and select the option with the fewest stops.
cases.verdict: Could not complete within the remaining turn budget because the page state is stuck on an editable search form with Departure set to 'Wed, Apr 29' and Return empty, and repeated date-picker interactions failed/timed out. Concrete evidence on the current page: URL https://www.google.com/travel/flights?tfs=CBwQARopEgoyMDI2LTA0LTI5ag0IAxIJL20vMDFmMDhycgwIAxIIL20vMDZjNjIaHWoMCAMSCC9tLzA2YzYycg0IAxIJL20vMDFmMDhyQAFIAXABggELCP___________wGYAQE&tfu=KgIIAw ; visible fields show origin 'Dubai', destination 'Rome', class 'Economy', trip type 'Round trip', Departure 'Wed, Apr 29', Return blank. Extracted controls indicated hidden date-picker navigation buttons ('Previous'/'Next') and a hidden selected date 'Wednesday, April 29, 2026, departure date', but they were not reliably interactable. Therefore I could not reach results for Mar 1–Mar 8, 2026 or compare stop counts/prices.

cases.goal: Search for the cheapest round-trip flights from Bangkok to Madrid, leaving on February 26, 2026, and returning on February 28, 2026, and provide options under $1000.
cases.verdict: On Google Flights (URL: https://www.google.com/travel/flights?tfs=CBwQARocagwIAxIIL20vMGZuMmdyDAgDEggvbS8wNTZfeRocagwIAxIIL20vMDU2X3lyDAgDEggvbS8wZm4yZ0ABSAFwAYIBCwj___________8BmAEB&tfu=KgIIAw), the visible calendar pricing for the Bangkok → Madrid round-trip search shows multiple options under $1000. Visible examples include: May 2, 2026 — $689; May 7 — $689; May 8 — $689; May 9 — $689; May 11 — $689; May 12 — $689; May 13 — $689; May 14 — $689; May 15 — $689; May 16 — $689; May 18 — $689; May 19 — $689; May 20 — $689; May 23 — $689; May 26 — $689; May 28 — $689; May 29 — $689; May 30 — $689. Also visible under $1000: May 3 — $754, May 4 — $713, May 6 — $713, May 10 — $713, May 17 — $713, May 21 — $713, May 22 — $713, May 24 — $713, May 25 — $713, May 27 — $713. Therefore there are many round-trip options under $1000 visible on the page. However, the specific requested dates February 26, 2026 to February 28, 2026 are not currently visible in the extracted calendar evidence.

cases.goal: Locate a one-way flight from Johannesburg to Toronto on March 30, 2026, for one adult, and analyze the price trends for the following month.
cases.verdict: Located a one-way Google Flights search for 1 adult from Johannesburg to Toronto with departure set to 03/30/2026. Evidence: URL https://www.google.com/travel/flights?tfs=CBwQARocagwIAxIIL20vMGcyODRyDAgDEggvbS8waDdoNkABSAFwAYIBCwj___________8BmAEC&tfu=KgIIAw ; visible state shows 'One way', traveler count '1', origin 'Johannesburg', destination previously selected as 'Toronto, Ontario, Canada', and departure field value '03/30/2026'. Visible following-month prices on the calendar for May 2026 are: May 1 $955, May 2 $884, May 3 $869, May 4 $869, May 5 $869, May 6 $871, May 7 $869, May 8 $955, May 9 $832, May 10 $857, May 11 $857, May 12 $867, May 13 $857, May 14 $869, May 15 $871, May 16 $884, May 17 $867, May 18 $752, May 19 $752, May 20 $804, May 21 $869, May 22 $804, May 23 $901, May 24 $867, May 25 $791, May 26 $867, May 27 $804, May 28 $818, May 29 $804, May 30 $884, May 31 $818. Trend analysis: lowest visible fare is $752 on May 18 and May 19; highest visible fare is $955 on May 1 and May 8; most dates cluster in the mid-$800s, especially $857-$871; the second half of May is generally cheaper than early May; several weekend departures are higher, including May 2 $884, May 16 $884, May 23 $901, and May 30 $884. Best visible value in the following month is around May 18-19.

cases.goal: Find the best-priced round-trip flight from Seattle to Paris, departing on February 27, 2026, and returning on March 1, 2026, with a maximum of one stop.
